query:
INSERT INTO whatsapp_command_permissions (command, description, requiredRole, isEnabled, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES 
('/team', 'List assigned subcontractors', 'admin', true, NOW(), NOW()),
('/checklist', 'Show project checklist', 'admin', true, NOW(), NOW()),
('/notes', 'Show project notes', 'admin', true, NOW(), NOW()),
('/changes', 'Show change orders', 'admin', true, NOW(), NOW()),
('/list', 'List all projects or projects for a date', 'admin', true, NOW(), NOW()),
('/count', 'Get project count', 'admin', true, NOW(), NOW()),
('/insights', 'Show dashboard insights', 'admin', true, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE isEnabled = true, updatedAt = NOW();
